description_long: This object is a modern assault rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a prominent barrel and a fixed stock. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and has visible iron sights mounted along the top rail. Scattered around the rifle are several loose rounds of ammunition and a few spent shell casings, suggesting recent use or preparation for action. The handguard and grip appear to be made of polymer, while the main body and barrel are constructed from metal. The rifle also features a bayonet attached to the front, enhancing its close-quarters capability. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details typical of military-grade firearms.
description: A modern black assault rifle with a fixed stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a bayonet, surrounded by loose ammunition and shell casings.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a side angle, showing the full length, fixed stock, bayonet, and scattered ammunition.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the barrel alignment, iron sights, and the arrangement of ammunition around the rifle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the magazine, grip, and bayonet, with more detail on the handguard and stock.
description_view_3: A rearward view focuses on the stock and grip, with the barrel and bayonet extending away, and ammunition visible in the foreground.
